Herefordshire & all surrounding areas

Precision tree
surgery you can
rely on.

Professional arboriculture for domestic and commercial clients across Herefordshire and all surrounding areas — including Hereford, Leominster, Ross-on-Wye, Ledbury, the Forest of Dean, Monmouth and Gloucester. Fully insured, qualified, and committed to the highest standards of tree care.

Get in Touch Our Services
What we do

Expert arboricultural services

From routine maintenance to complex aerial work, every job is carried out to the same exacting standard — clean, safe, and considerate of your property.

Tree Surgery & Pruning

Crown reduction, thinning, lifting, and deadwooding carried out to BS 3998 standards to improve health, structure, and appearance.

Tree Felling & Removal

Safe, controlled felling and sectional dismantling of trees in constrained spaces.

Aerial Tree Work

Certified aerial rigging and climbing for high-specification work where access equipment cannot reach — precision without compromise.

Hedge Trimming

Formal and informal hedge cutting for residential and commercial properties, from boundary hedges to shaped specimen hedging.

About us — veteran owned

Forces values.
Precision work.

Precision ARB is a veteran-owned tree surgery company based in Herefordshire, covering Herefordshire, the Forest of Dean, Monmouth, Gloucester and all surrounding areas. Founded on the discipline, reliability, and attention to detail learned in the military, we bring that same standard to every job — and a genuine care for trees, clients, and the wider environment.

An ex-military background means turning up on time, working safely, and finishing the job properly — no shortcuts. We're fully insured, work to British Standards across all operations, and leave every site clean and tidy.

NPTC
Qualified operatives

British Standards

Qualifications & accreditations
